project.name: MP2027 Manager
project.status: Hotfix P1 In-Progress (GA Headcount Logic Restoration)

database_schema.summary: Hub-centric model with dimensions, rules, and facts records mapped by Cost Center and Account.

tables.name: dim_cost_centers
tables.description: Master data for CCs with HC splits.

tables.name: map_allocation_rules
tables.description: Rules for HC and WD allocations.

tables.name: sys_params
tables.description: Exchange rates and dynamic FY settings.

tables.name: fact_monthly_headcount
tables.description: Dynamic monthly driver source for GA (Refactor V4.5).

features: Professional Tkinter GUI with Log Window
B2 Exchange Rate SSOT (Source of Truth from Hub B2)
Month-end Depreciation Logic (Auto-zeroing after end month)
Dynamic GA Headcount Driver (CC x Month resolution)
Emoji-free source code (Mandatory for Japanese CP932 safety)
Resilient Fiscal Year parsing (Handles 'FY2027' and 2027 formats)
Direct XML Excel Inspection (Zipfile + ElementTree) for corrupted sources

gotchas: UnicodeEncodeError: Japanese CP932 terminal rejects emojis and non-standard symbols in print().
Fiscal Year format inconsistency (int vs 'FY' string in sys_params)
Unterminated strings in Japanese literals (mojibake risk)
GA Headcount Data Scope: Source file `総務課` only contains Total Company Headcount, not per-CC.
conventions: Standard cost types: 製造, 一般, 販売
